Our
Expertise

01

Data, ai & tech

Learn more

/Flagship Solutions

Data Transformation

Build strong foundations in data engineering, analytics, and visualization — equipping professionals to turn raw data into actionable business insights.

AI Transformation

Demystify AI and build hands-on skills in GenAI, LLMs, agentic systems, and AI-powered workflows — equipping teams to solve real problems with AI-first thinking.

Digital Transformation

Develop competencies in software engineering, cloud, cybersecurity, and DevOps — so your organization can innovate, scale, and deliver faster.

Certifications

Strengthen your workforce with globally recognized certifications across IT service management, Agile, operational excellence, testing, and cybersecurity.

02

Leadership & Diversity

Learn more

/Flagship Solutions

Leadership Development for Every Level

Expert-guided leadership programs tailored for every career stage — from emerging professionals to CXOs — building the skills that drive growth and impact.

Diversity and Inclusion Training

DEI programs designed to build inclusive, psychologically safe workplaces — covering gender, identity, generations, ability, and beyond across every level of the organization.

On-demand Learning

A flexible library of self-paced leadership and behavioral courses that empower continuous learning and skill-building, anytime, tailored to evolving business needs.

Skill Intensives

Focused workshops and learning sprints that build essential leadership and power skills across the organization.

On-Demand Workshops

A flexible library of leadership and behavioral courses for continuous growth.

03

Sales &
Service

Learn more

/Flagship Solutions

Product Mastery

Deepen your teams' understanding of your product ecosystem, landscape, and technical specifications — so they can confidently address client needs and differentiate in the market.

Process Excellence

Tailored coaching to help teams master and consistently apply organization-specific workflows — driving operational efficiency and reliability across the board.

Customer Centricity

Behavioral interventions that build a consultative, client-first mindset — focused on building lasting relationships and delivering results.

04

Talent Fulfilment

Learn more

/Our Hire-Train-Deploy Engine

Hire

AI-driven talent sourcing matched to your role requirements — with capability, context, and cultural fit assessments to get the right people, faster.

Train

Industry-aligned, customised curriculum built around your tech stack — with hands-on, project-based learning, domain mentorship, and a go/no-go assessment before deployment.

Deploy

Seamless onboarding with full compliance and documentation, performance tracking, and a retention focus through continuous engagement, upskilling, and career pathing.

05

Thriversity

Learn more

/Learning Formats

THRIVE Courses

Self-paced learning built on academic frameworks and practitioner insights — with practice exercises designed to drive real application on the job.

THRIVE Master

Premium self-paced masterclasses led by industry practitioners, using contextual storytelling and proprietary skills frameworks grounded in research from 300+ enterprises.

THRIVE Live

Interactive live sessions that bring learners together for peer learning, real-world problem solving, and immediate application of concepts.

/Learning Formats

THRIVE Master

upGrad’s Personalized AI Coaching Engine

uPACE is the market’s most powerful AI coach, putting your teams into realistic simulations to rehearse high-stake scenarios before they happen in real life.

From sales teams practicing difficult customer conversations to leaders navigating ethical dilemmas and trade-offs, the AI responds dynamically in real time to stress-test judgment.

This scalable environment provides unlimited practice, instant rubric-based feedback, and deep analytics to identify skill gaps and transform team performance into measurable business impact.

How uPACE Works

Learn
Micro-learning modules contextualized to your role and industry.
Practice
Real-world simulations to apply new skills safely and confidently.
Get Coached
Instant AI-driven feedback and manager insights to sustain improvement.

Real Impact, delivered

18.5% reduction
in service escalations

for a leading Indian bank through targeted Sales & Service training, boosting NPS by 7 points and significantly accelerating turnaround time.

⁠85% improvement
in leadership behaviours

among high performers at a global hospitality leader, through customised executive coaching and mentoring pathways.

24.3% increase
in gender diversity in leadership

and 33% program participants promoted to leadership roles at a global enterprise through our multimodal learning journey aligned to collaboration, scale, and velocity.

4.5/5 average learner
rating

for training a global IT leader's architects and developers on building, deploying, and scaling AI/ML solutions efficiently.

1400+ campus
graduates hired

trained, and deployed at a global consulting and outsourcing market leader.

Why Enterprises
Choose Us

From promise to proven performance

Through a 10M+ learner ecosystem, we drive continuous skill development and growth across enterprises globally.

With international expertise across six continents, we bring global best practices to every learning initiative.

Through role-based learning paths customised across 25+ roles, we ensure relevant, workforce-aligned development.

Each outcome-driven program is tied to measurable KPIs, ensuring accountability and tangible business results.

As a hire-to-retire partner, we deliver end-to-end solutions across the entire employee lifecycle.

Through industry-specific contextualisation, our programs are tailored to real-world business needs and challenges.

Talent Insights

/Report
UK-India Tech Skills Exchange: Unlocking Growth Through Talent
In a period marked by economic volatility and regulatory complexity, the UK–India Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) offers businesses greater clarity and continuity.
/Report
The Tech Talent Landscape
AI adoption is accelerating. Workforce readiness isn’t. Explore the data shaping India’s tech talent landscape in 2026.
/Report
The Power Skills Imperative: Global Outlook 2026
Power skills are now central to how work gets done, and how results are delivered. Drawing on insights from 1,600+ people leaders globally, this report explores which human capabilities drive performance, how they’re measured today, and what leaders must do to scale impact.
/Report
The GenAI Gap: GenZ & the Modern Workplace
An exploration of Generation Z’s journey with Generative AI: Their attitudes, ambitions, anxieties, and adoption in the Indian professional landscape.
/Podcast
AI at Scale, People at Heart: Lessons in Building an AI-First Financial Services Organization
L&T Finance’s Nilesh Dange shares how large enterprises can scale AI meaningfully while keeping people, culture, and trust at the center of transformation.
/Blog
The Evolution of Storytelling: From Panchatantra to Generative AI
From ancient tales to modern tech, storytelling conveys vital lessons. Generative AI now transforms business storytelling with rapid research, personalization, and knowledge management, changing how organizations connect and engage with stakeholders through enhanced narrative creation.
/Blog
The Evolution of Storytelling: From Panchatantra to Generative AI
From ancient tales to modern tech, storytelling conveys vital lessons. Generative AI now transforms business storytelling with rapid research, personalization, and knowledge management, changing how organizations connect and engage with stakeholders through enhanced narrative creation.
